From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

(Redirected from [American 21 inch torpedo](/w/index.php?title=American_21_inch_torpedo&redirect=no "American 21 inch torpedo"))

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
|  | This article includes a list of [general references](/wiki/Wikipedia:Citing_sources#General_references "Wikipedia:Citing sources"), but **it lacks sufficient corresponding [inline citations](/wiki/Wikipedia:Citing_sources#Inline_citations "Wikipedia:Citing sources")**. Please help to [improve](/wiki/Wikipedia:WikiProject_Reliability "Wikipedia:WikiProject Reliability") this article by [introducing](/wiki/Wikipedia:When_to_cite "Wikipedia:When to cite") more precise citations. *(March 2026)* *([Learn how and when to remove this message](/wiki/Help:Maintenance_template_removal "Help:Maintenance template removal"))* |

There have been a number of **21-inch torpedoes** in service with the United States. These have been used on ships and submarines of the [U.S. Navy](/wiki/U.S._Navy "U.S. Navy"). American 21-inch [torpedoes](/wiki/Torpedo "Torpedo") are 533 millimeters in diameter.

Ship classes that carried 21-inch torpedoes include:

* [*Allen M. Sumner*-class destroyers](/wiki/Allen_M._Sumner-class_destroyer "Allen M. Sumner-class destroyer")
* [*Atlanta*-class cruisers](/wiki/Atlanta-class_cruiser "Atlanta-class cruiser")
* [*Bagley*-class destroyers](/wiki/Bagley-class_destroyer "Bagley-class destroyer")
* [*Balao*-class submarines](/wiki/Balao-class_submarine "Balao-class submarine")
* [*Barbel*-class submarines](/wiki/Barbel-class_submarine "Barbel-class submarine")
* [*Barracuda*-class submarines](/wiki/United_States_Barracuda-class_submarine_(1951) "United States Barracuda-class submarine (1951)")
* [*Benham*-class destroyers](/wiki/Benham-class_destroyer "Benham-class destroyer")
* [*Benjamin Franklin*-class submarines](/wiki/Benjamin_Franklin-class_submarine "Benjamin Franklin-class submarine")
* [*Benson*-class destroyers](/wiki/Benson-class_destroyer "Benson-class destroyer")
* [*Cachalot*-class submarines](/wiki/Cachalot-class_submarine "Cachalot-class submarine")
* [*Caldwell*-class destroyers](/wiki/Caldwell-class_destroyer "Caldwell-class destroyer")
* [*Cassin*-class destroyers](/wiki/Cassin-class_destroyer "Cassin-class destroyer")

* [*Dealey*-class destroyer escorts](/wiki/Dealey-class_destroyer_escort "Dealey-class destroyer escort")
